raw_description:
Exceptional Facilities:The Jeddah EDITION in Jeddah offers a rooftop swimming pool, spa facilities, fitness centre, sun terrace, restaurant, bar, and free WiFi. Guests can also enjoy a lounge, wellness packages, fitness room, 24-hour front desk, concierge service, and electric vehicle charging station.Comfortable Accommodations:Rooms feature air-conditioning, terrace or balcony, carpeted floors, TV, electric kettle, wardrobe, and sea or city views. Additional amenities include bathrobes, patio, private bathroom, bidet, hairdryer, coffee machine, work desk, and soundproofing.Dining Experience:The modern, family-friendly restaurant serves French, Mediterranean, Asian, and international cuisines with halal, vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, and dairy-free options. Breakfast includes continental, American, vegetarian, vegan, halal, gluten-free, and Asian selections.Prime Location:Located 7 km from King Abdulaziz International Airport, the hotel is steps from the Floating Mosque. Nearby attractions include Red Sea Mall (4.2 km), Mall of Arabia (10 km), and Jeddah Corniche (21 km). Guests appreciate the attentive staff, scenic views, and comfortable rooms.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it9.4for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at The Jeddah EDITION. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 10 key amenities including Outdoor swimming pool, Free WiFi, Family rooms.
